name: Film Capacitor Series FC-100
description: High-voltage metallized polypropylene film capacitors for power electronics, inverters, and motor drives. Rated up to 1000V DC with exceptional self-healing characteristics.

name: Electrolytic Capacitor EL-450
description: Aluminium electrolytic capacitors optimized for high ripple current applications. Available in snap-in and screw-terminal configurations for industrial power supplies.

name: Supercapacitor Module SC-25F
description: 25 Farad symmetric supercapacitor module for energy harvesting, UPS backup, and burst-power applications. Operating temperature range: -40°C to +65°C.

name: Ceramic Capacitor Array CA-SMD
description: Surface-mount multilayer ceramic capacitor arrays in 0402 to 1210 case sizes. X7R and C0G dielectrics available. Ideal for decoupling and filtering in PCB designs.

name: Custom Capacitor Module
description: Fully custom-engineered capacitor assemblies designed to your exact specifications. Voltage, capacitance, form factor, and environmental ratings specified by you.

name: Film Capacitor Series FC-500
description: Heavy-duty DC link capacitors for high-power converters and traction applications. Designed for 105°C ambient with extended service life exceeding 100,000 hours.
